ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_status" TEXT /* Draft status of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the player */,
  "nba_experience" INTEGER /* Years of NBA experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1980-81) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's season statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "field_goals_made" REAL /* Total field goals made */,
  "three_point_field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Total three-point field goals attempted */,
  "three_point_field_goals_made" REAL /* Total three-point field goals made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" REAL /* Total free throws attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" REAL /* Total free throws made */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Usage percentage */,
  "box_plus_minus" REAL /* Box plus/minus */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win shares */,
  "win_shares_per_48_minutes" REAL /* Win shares per 48 minutes */,
  "advanced_position" TEXT /* Advanced position played by the player */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mvps" (
  "mvp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MVP voting entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Team's win percentage in the season */,
  "first_place_votes" INTEGER /* Number of first-place votes received */,
  "points_won" INTEGER /* Total points won in the MVP voting */,
  "points_max" INTEGER /* Maximum possible points in the MVP voting */,
  "award_share" REAL /* Share of the MVP award */,
  "mvp_or_not" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player won the MVP award */,
  "mvp_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the MVP voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mvp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mvps_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mvps_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, guest) */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., player, MVP) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player returned from the injury */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture, strain) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_biographies" (
  "bio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biography */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College where the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "nba_debut" TEXT /* Date the player made their NBA debut */,
  "retirement_year" TEXT /* Year the player retired */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards and honors received by the player */,
  "high_school_awards" TEXT /* Awards received in high school */,
  "hall_of_fame_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was inducted into the Hall of Fame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_biographies_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the team */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Team's win percentage */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Team's rank in the conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Team's rank in the division */,
  "division_won" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team won the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's season statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "field_goals_made" REAL /* Total field goals made */,
  "three_point_field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Total three-point field goals attempted */,
  "three_point_field_goals_made" REAL /* Total three-point field goals made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" REAL /* Total free throws attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" REAL /* Total free throws made */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "three_point_field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_point_field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the away team */,
  "home_won" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the home team won */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
